Anskaffelser.no | Direktoratet for forvaltning og økonomistyring

https://www.anskaffelser.no/
Avvik: 121 | Bestått: 180
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-hidden="true" src="/sites/default/files/styles/card_illustration/public/2022-01/innovasjon_moseng.png?itok=JB5CoNSf"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="path-frontpage page-node-type-landing-page"> <a class="visually-hidden focusable" href="#main-content"> Hopp til hovedinnhold </a> <div class="dialog-off-canvas-main-canvas" dat
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="has-text-align-center has-primary-dark-blue-color has-text-color" style="line-height:0">Snarveier</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['a', 'a', 'a']

<ul class="process-list"><a href="/anskaffelsesprosess/anskaffelsesprosessen-steg-steg/avklare-behov-og-forberede-konkurransen"><span>Avklare behov og forberede konkurransen</span></a><a href="/anskaf
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (12 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (164 characters)

Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Link opens in new window without indication

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '1105' appears 2 times

id="1105"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Konsulenttjenester | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/hva-skal-du-kjope/konsulenttjenester
Avvik: 111 | Bestått: 160
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="toc__header">Innholdsfortegnelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded menu-item--active-trail"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-ska
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (169 characters)

<a class="card__title-link" data-id="1418" data-type="tool" href="/verktoy/veiledere/veileder-kjop-av-konsulenttjenester"><div class="card__copy"><div class="card__title"><span>Veileder for kjøp av ko
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo" target="_blank">Om DFØ</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/personvern" target="_blank">Personvern</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/en/english" target="_blank">English</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

Lov og forskrifter om offentlege anskaffingar | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/nn/avtaler-og-regelverk/lov-og-forskrifter-om-offentlege-anskaffingar
Avvik: 111 | Bestått: 166
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="toc__header">Innhaldsliste</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-skal-du-kjope" hreflang="nb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo" target="_blank">Om DFØ</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/personvern" target="_blank">Personvern</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/en/english" target="_blank">English</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (101 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe allowfullscreen="" src="https://embed.acast.com/$/62627c299551fc00157303d4/a-kjpe-for-norge-dypdykk-i-reglene-for-offentlige-anskaffels?" style="width:100%;height:300px;frame-border:0;overflow

Felles kjøreregler for anskaffelser | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/anskaffelsesprosess/felles-kjoreregler-anskaffelser
Avvik: 111 | Bestått: 166
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="toc__header">Innholdsfortegnelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-skal-du-kjope" hreflang="nb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (102 characters)

<a href="https://www.regjeringen.no/no/dokumenter/meld.-st.-22-20182019/id2641507/">stortingsmelding 22 (2018–2019) Smartere innkjøp – effektive og profesjonelle offentlige anskaffelser.</a>
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo" target="_blank">Om DFØ</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/personvern" target="_blank">Personvern</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/en/english" target="_blank">English</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (100 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Kunngjøringer av konkurranser | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/data-statistikk-og-analyse/kunngjoringer-av-konkurranser
Avvik: 119 | Bestått: 175
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="20" viewbox="0 0 20 20" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g clip-path="url(#clip0_1188_3048)"><path d="M16.0002 20C14.2292 20 12.3452 19.498 10.4002 18.508C8.6071
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="12" viewbox="0 0 19 12" width="19" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M17.5 0H1.5C0.673 0 0 0.673 0 1.5V10.5C0 11.327 0.673 12 1.5 12H17.5C18.327 12 19 11.327 19 10.5
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (11 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="toc__header">Innholdsfortegnelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-skal-du-kjope" hreflang="nb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table><thead><tr><th>Skjema nr.</th><th>Beskrivelse</th><th>Forskrift</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>10<br/></td><td>Forhåndskunngjøring brukt som utlysning av konkurranse – standard regime</td><td>
Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Skjema nr.</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Beskrivelse</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Forskrift</th>
Add scope='col' or scope='row' to table headers
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Data table has no caption or label

<table><thead><tr><th>Søkeord</th><th>Forskrift</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td>Anskaffelsesforskriften, forskrift om offentlige anskaffelser, FOA</td><td>Anskaffelsesforskriften (FOA)</td></tr><tr><t
Add <caption> element or aria-label to describe the table
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th>Søkeord</th>

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<th>Forskrift</th>

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo" target="_blank">Om DFØ</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/personvern" target="_blank">Personvern</a>

<a href="https://dfo.no/en/english" target="_blank">English</a>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

https://www.anskaffelser.no/hva-skal-du-kjope/transport
Avvik: 123 | Bestått: 182
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-hidden="true" src="/sites/default/files/styles/card/public/2022-04/Elverum_el.jpg?h=52d3fcb6&itok=Ax862vPM"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-hidden="true" src="/sites/default/files/styles/card/public/2022-04/Hvaler_el.jpg?h=52d3fcb6&itok=h1yKkQ1A"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-hidden="true" src="/sites/default/files/styles/card/public/2022-02/Styring_Mosengfigur_0.png?h=38747c88&itok=EU1h6Stz"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded menu-item--active-trail"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-ska
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>

Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input alt="Søk" class="image-button js-form-submit form-submit" data-drupal-selector="edit-submit-site-search" id="edit-submit-site-search" src="/themes/dfo-platform/drupal-platform-themes/dfo/assets
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Klimafotavtrykket til offentlige anskaffelser | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/data-statistikk-og-analyse/klimafotavtrykket-til-offentlige-anskaffelser
Avvik: 116 | Bestått: 173
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="20" viewbox="0 0 20 20" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g clip-path="url(#clip0_1188_3048)"><path d="M16.0002 20C14.2292 20 12.3452 19.498 10.4002 18.508C8.6071
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="12" viewbox="0 0 19 12" width="19" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M17.5 0H1.5C0.673 0 0 0.673 0 1.5V10.5C0 11.327 0.673 12 1.5 12H17.5C18.327 12 19 11.327 19 10.5
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="toc__header">Innholdsfortegnelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-skal-du-kjope" hreflang="nb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo" target="_blank">Om DFØ</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/personvern" target="_blank">Personvern</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/en/english" target="_blank">English</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (104 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

Digitalisering av anskaffingsprosessen | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/nn/innkjopsledelse/digitalisering-av-anskaffingsprosessen
Avvik: 112 | Bestått: 191
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="toc__header">Innhaldsliste</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-skal-du-kjope" hreflang="nb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo" target="_blank">Om DFØ</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/personvern" target="_blank">Personvern</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/en/english" target="_blank">English</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

<input alt="Søk" class="image-button js-form-submit form-submit" data-drupal-selector="edit-submit-site-search" id="edit-submit-site-search" src="/themes/dfo-platform/drupal-platform-themes/dfo/assets
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Innovative anskaffelser i praksis: kompetanseløft på tre nivåer | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/innovasjon/innovative-anskaffelser-i-praksis-kompetanseloft-pa-tre-nivaer
Avvik: 110 | Bestått: 164
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="toc__header">Innholdsfortegnelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-skal-du-kjope" hreflang="nb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo" target="_blank">Om DFØ</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/personvern" target="_blank">Personvern</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/en/english" target="_blank">English</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

Krav til digitalisering i offentleg regelverk | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/nn/avtaler-og-regelverk/krav-til-digitalisering-i-offentleg-regelverk
Avvik: 114 | Bestått: 170
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="toc__header">Innhaldsliste</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-skal-du-kjope" hreflang="nb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (117 characters)

<a href="/nn/node/543" rel="bookmark"> <strong> Fakturering og betaling </strong> <div> <div><p>Lage en EHF-faktura og sende den til mottaker. Motta en faktura og behandle den i eget sys
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (132 characters)

<a href="/nn/node/24" rel="bookmark"> <strong> Elektronisk handelsformat (EHF) </strong> <div> <div><p>Informasjon om Elektronisk handelsformat (EHF) og hvordan man utveksler de via digi
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo" target="_blank">Om DFØ</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/personvern" target="_blank">Personvern</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/en/english" target="_blank">English</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'https://anskaffelser.dev/postaward/g3/spec/' appears 2 times

id="https://anskaffelser.dev/postaward/g3/spec/"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'https://anskaffelser.dev/postaward/g3/spec/billing-3.0/' appears 2 times

id="https://anskaffelser.dev/postaward/g3/spec/billing-3.0/"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Kontakt oss om faglige spørsmål | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/dfos-arbeid-med-offentlige-anskaffelser/kontakt-oss-om-faglige-sporsmal
Avvik: 110 | Bestått: 153
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="toc__header">Innholdsfortegnelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-skal-du-kjope" hreflang="nb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (149 characters)

<a href="/ofte-stilte-sporsmal-om-anskaffelser" rel="bookmark"> <strong> Ofte stilte spørsmål om anskaffelser </strong> <div> <div><p>Her finner du svar på vanlige spørsmål fra noen utva
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo" target="_blank">Om DFØ</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/personvern" target="_blank">Personvern</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/en/english" target="_blank">English</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.

Bygg, anlegg og eiendom (BAE) | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/hva-skal-du-kjope/bygg-anlegg-og-eiendom-bae
Avvik: 119 | Bestått: 171
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded menu-item--active-trail"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-ska
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['a', 'a', 'a']

List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input alt="Søk" class="image-button js-form-submit form-submit" data-drupal-selector="edit-submit-site-search" id="edit-submit-site-search" src="/themes/dfo-platform/drupal-platform-themes/dfo/assets
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

ESPD - europeisk egenerklæringsskjema | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/anskaffelsesprosess/anskaffelsesprosessen-steg-steg/avklare-behov-og-forberede-konkurransen/kvalifikasjonskrav/espd-europeisk-egenerklaeringsskjema
Avvik: 112 | Bestått: 202
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Canvas element has no text alternative

<canvas data-number-arrows="3" height="149" id="processCanvas" width="1146"></canvas>
Add aria-label or fallback text content inside canvas
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-skal-du-kjope" hreflang="nb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo" target="_blank">Om DFØ</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/personvern" target="_blank">Personvern</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/en/english" target="_blank">English</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (102 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

<aside class="layout-top-content" role="complementary"> <nav aria-labelledby="top-level-process-navigation" class="process-top-navigation" role="navigation"> <h2 class="visually-hidden" id="top-level-
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='complementary' needs an accessible name

<aside class="sidebar" role="complementary"> <nav aria-labelledby="under-level-process-navigation" class="process-sub-navigation" role="navigation"> <h2 class="visually-hidden" id="under-level-process
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute

Om statens innkjøpssenter | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/statens-innkjopssenter/om-statens-innkjopssenter
Avvik: 110 | Bestått: 158
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 3 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-skal-du-kjope" hreflang="nb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo" target="_blank">Om DFØ</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/personvern" target="_blank">Personvern</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/en/english" target="_blank">English</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'block-dfo-page-title' appears 2 times

id="block-dfo-page-title"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Sikkerhetsloven og offentlige anskaffelser | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/avtaler-og-regelverk/sikkerhetsloven-og-offentlige-anskaffelser
Avvik: 110 | Bestått: 164
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="toc__header">Innholdsfortegnelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-skal-du-kjope" hreflang="nb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo" target="_blank">Om DFØ</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/personvern" target="_blank">Personvern</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/en/english" target="_blank">English</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

Anskaffelse av varer og tjenester til helse- og sosialsektoren | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/hva-skal-du-kjope/anskaffelse-av-varer-og-tjenester-til-helse-og-sosialsektoren
Avvik: 112 | Bestått: 157
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img aria-hidden="true" src="/sites/default/files/styles/card/public/omsorgsfull_hjelpepleier.jpg?h=1aec251a&itok=-NV8sEJC"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="toc__header">Innholdsfortegnelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded menu-item--active-trail"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-ska
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (120 characters)

<a class="card card--large card__title-link has-primary-dark-blue-background-color" data-id="www.anskaffelser.no/verktoy/veiledere/veileder-kjop-av-helse-og-sosialtjenester" data-type="url" href="http
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo" target="_blank">Om DFØ</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/personvern" target="_blank">Personvern</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/en/english" target="_blank">English</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

Statistikk om klima- og miljøhensyn i offentlige anskaffelser | Anskaffelser.no

https://www.anskaffelser.no/data-statistikk-og-analyse/statistikk-om-klima-og-miljohensyn-i-offentlige-anskaffelser
Avvik: 118 | Bestått: 176
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="20" viewbox="0 0 20 20" width="20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><g clip-path="url(#clip0_1188_3048)"><path d="M16.0002 20C14.2292 20 12.3452 19.498 10.4002 18.508C8.6071
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="12" viewbox="0 0 19 12" width="19" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M17.5 0H1.5C0.673 0 0 0.673 0 1.5V10.5C0 11.327 0.673 12 1.5 12H17.5C18.327 12 19 11.327 19 10.5
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="visually-hidden" id="system-breadcrumb">Navigasjonssti</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="toc__header">Innholdsfortegnelse</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has 2 main landmarks (should have 1)

<main>
Use only one <main> element per page
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" class="main-menu js-dfo-closed"> <ul class="menu"> <li class="menu-item menu-item--expanded"> <a data-drupal-link-system-path="node/1106" href="/hva-skal-du-kjope" hreflang="nb
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo" target="_blank">Om DFØ</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/om-dfo/personvern" target="_blank">Personvern</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://dfo.no/en/english" target="_blank">English</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="form-text" data-drupal-selector="edit-search-api-fulltext" id="edit-search-api-fulltext--2" maxlength="128" name="search_api_fulltext" placeholder="Søk" size="30" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="form-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-answer-no" id="edit-answer-no" name="answer_no" tabindex="-1" type="checkbox" value="Nei"/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://anskaffelser.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://anskaffelser.no --max-pages 20 --format html
